name: synthora

metadata.name: synthora
metadata.summary: Synthora is a lightweight and extensible framework for LLM-driven Agents and ALM research. It provides essential components to build, test and evaluate agents. At its core, Synthora aims to assemble an agent with a single config, thus minimizing your effort in building, tuning, and sharing agents.

# Synthora
Synthora is a lightweight and extensible framework for LLM-driven Agents and ALM research. It provides essential components to build, test and evaluate agents. At its core, Synthora aims to assemble an agent with a single config, thus minimizing your effort in building, tuning, and sharing agents.

methods.name: synthora.toolkits.basic_math_toolkit.BasicMathToolkit.async_add
documentation:
Add two numbers together

Args:
    a (Union[int, float]): The first number
    b (Union[int, float]): The second number

Returns:
    Union[int, float]: The sum of the two numbers

methods.name: synthora.toolkits.basic_math_toolkit.BasicMathToolkit.add
documentation:
Add two numbers together

Args:
    a (Union[int, float]): The first number
    b (Union[int, float]): The second number

Returns:
    Union[int, float]: The sum of the two numbers

methods.name: synthora.toolkits.basic_math_toolkit.BasicMathToolkit.subtract
documentation:
Subtract two numbers

Args:
    a (Union[int, float]): The first number
    b (Union[int, float]): The second number

Returns:
    Union[int, float]: The difference of the two numbers

methods.name: synthora.toolkits.basic_math_toolkit.BasicMathToolkit.multiply
documentation:
Multiply two numbers together

Args:
    a (Union[int, float]): The first number
    b (Union[int, float]): The second number

Returns:
    Union[int, float]: The product of the two numbers

methods.name: synthora.toolkits.basic_math_toolkit.BasicMathToolkit.divide
documentation:
Divide two numbers

Args:
    a (Union[int, float]): The first number
    b (Union[int, float]): The second number

Returns:
    Union[int, float]: The quotient of the two numbers
